raw_consumer_statement:
am submitting this complaint regarding Citibanks failure to properly resolve fraudulent charges on my credit card account. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX unauthorized charges posted to my Citibank credit card account. Citibank itself flagged these transactions as suspected fraud, and I immediately confirmed to Citibank that the charges were unauthorized.

Despite Citibanks own fraud detection and my prompt notification : Citibank never issued provisional credit Citibank never issued final credit The fraudulent charges remain unresolved I have complied with all requirements and reported the fraud immediately. Under the Fair Credit Billing Act, consumers are not liable for unauthorized credit card transactions, and issuers are required to conduct a timely investigation and provide appropriate credit once fraud is reported.

Citibanks failure to issue any credit, despite flagging the charges as fraud themselves, has caused ongoing financial harm and reflects a breakdown in Citibanks fraud resolution process. 

I am requesting that Citibank : Immediately credit my account for all XXXX fraudulent charges Provide written confirmation that I have zero liability for these charges Confirm that the matter is fully resolved and closed I am requesting CFPB assistance to ensure Citibank complies with its obligations and resolves this matter without further delay. 

XXXX XXXX
